name: Pie Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box cake mix (do not use a mix with pudding)
20 ounces crushed pineapple in syrup, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the undrained pineapple into a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan and spread evenly.
2. Layer the pie filling over the pineapple fairly evenly.
3. Sprinkle the dry cake mix over the layers and pat down lightly with your fingertips.
4. Sprinkle the chopped pecans over the cake mix and dot with tiny pieces of margarine.
5. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 50-55 minutes, or until set when pressed lightly with fingers. Serve warm or cold.
